S.FORM: Vajiralongkorn I 1952 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 28 a romi'ad masofoc ci Vajiralongkorn, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Thailand anini i ci Vajiralongkorn, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 13 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: b~vajira…ĺo~uŇčko~urn i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~vajira…ĺo~uŇčko~urn, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u tńßai…ĺan…¨~…ģ anini i ¶i b~vajira…ĺo~uŇčko~urn, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Vajiralongkorn I 1952 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 28 a romi'ad masofoc ci Vajiralongkorn, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Thailand anini i ci Vajiralongkorn, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 13 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: b~vajira…ĺo~uŇčko~urn i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~vajira…ĺo~uŇčko~urn, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u tńßai…ĺan…¨~…ģ anini i ¶i b~vajira…ĺo~uŇčko~urn, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
